name: Brief
description: A Brief is a formal legal document, assignment, or court-related task. Every Brief must be associated with a Client and optionally a Matter. It tracks deadlines (due dates), categories of law, and execution status. Before creating a Brief, ensure the relevant Client and Matter (if applicable) are identified.

id.description: The unique identifier (CUID) for the brief.

briefNumber.description: The system-generated unique number for the brief.

customBriefNumber.description: A firm-specific identifier for the brief for internal tracking.

name.description: The title or subject of the brief.

category.description: The legal category of the brief (e.g., Litigation, Advisory, Corporate).

status.description: The current workflow status of the brief.

dueDate.description: The deadline for the brief's completion or filing.

description.description: Detailed notes or background information regarding the brief.
